title: Day 10: Day 10 — The Interview Process
content:
# Day 10 — The Interview Process

## Topic
**The Interview Process**

## 3–5 Key Points
1. **Use structured interviews, not casual chats.** Ask the same core questions each time so candidates are evaluated fairly and consistently.
2. **Screen for long-term fit, not just immediate production.** Look at mindset, coachability, professionalism, and alignment with your brokerage values.
3. **Watch for red flags early.** High turnover history, inconsistent performance explanations, blame-heavy language, and poor follow-through all matter.
4. **Prioritize quality over quantity.** A smaller number of high-fit recruits will outperform a larger batch of mismatched hires.
5. **Document your evaluations.** Keep notes after each interview so decisions are based on evidence, not memory or gut feel alone.

## Why It Matters
A strong interview process protects your time, brand, and retention. Recruiting the wrong agent is expensive and disruptive; recruiting the right one compounds revenue, culture, and team stability over time.
